title: Record the M2 work logistics architecture gate
summary: Record the architecture gate for M2 work/logistics owner stores, derived indexes, cache/version boundaries, save/replay scope, Worker parity and performance budgets before implementation tasks start.
acceptance: Architecture record names authoritative owners for M2 work offers reservations item quantities storage build/order progress path requests save/replay and Worker read models
Alternatives migration rollback test and performance implications are documented
Derived indexes and caches are versioned or rebuilt from owner stores and are not authoritative
Public Worker protocol save format schema dependency or package-boundary changes are either explicitly forbidden or separately gated
Downstream implementation block conditions are explicit

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Make M2 state ownership and contract boundaries reviewable before implementation.
benchmarkImpact: Defines required M2 metrics and regression gates only; no baseline update.
reviewRouting: Owner completes to reviewer. If rejected, all downstream M2 implementation remains proposed or blocked.
rollbackModel: Revert ADR/docs/task/report. Downstream tasks must not proceed without a verified architecture gate.
ownerGate: Include alternatives migration rollback tests and performance implications
Reject hidden shared state global scans unversioned caches and UI-owned simulation
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Architecture, state ownership, save/replay and performance-boundary work is explicitly outside Spark scope.
